title: MailerLite vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite vs Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: MailerLite vs Klaviyo: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: MailerLite and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. This comparison will help you determine which tool is the best fit for your business, whether you're a budget-conscious startup or a growing e-commerce brand.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a limited budget
You want an easy-to-use platform with drag-and-drop design capabilities
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys built into your email tool
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced features like predictive analytics and SMS marketing
You require sophisticated segmentation and customer journey automation

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for budgets and ease of use, particularly for small businesses. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce brands needing advanced automation and analytics. Both have the same G2 rating (4.6/5), but MailerLite scores higher on Trustpilot (4.5 vs 3.8).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Klaviyo?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly more affordable. It offers a free plan for up to 1,000 subscribers and starts at just $9/month for paid plans. Klaviyo's free plan caps at 500 subscribers and paid plans begin at $45/month, making it 5x more expensive at entry level.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email marketing data exports. You can export your subscriber lists and import them into MailerLite. However, complex automation workflows and historical campaign data may require manual setup, so plan migration carefully to avoid losing important information.
